whitepaper.title: The $NEXUS Protocol: A Governance Token for Frictionless DeSo Onboarding
whitepaper.abstract: The biggest friction point for decentralized social media (DeSo) adoption is onboarding: complex wallet setup, key management, and fragmented UX discourage mainstream users. $NEXUS solves this by providing a unified, custodial-to-sovereign transition layer: users onboard instantly with familiar credentials and gradually gain full sovereignty as they engage.
whitepaper.problem: Decentralized social platforms struggle with adoption because new users are confronted with private key management and confusing wallet UX before experiencing any value. This creates high drop-off at the very first step.
whitepaper.solution: NEXUS Onboarding Layer: users can start with Web2 credentials (email/social login), get a custodial wallet provisioned instantly, and migrate toward self-sovereignty by progressively assuming custody of their keys. $NEXUS token governs this onboarding protocol, incentivizing smooth transition from custodial to sovereign.

distribution.phase1: 30% to early adopters via incentivized onboarding pool
distribution.phase2: 40% to ecosystem partners, developers, and liquidity provisioning
distribution.phase3: 30% to long-term governance treasury for sustaining the network

utility: Rewards for referring and guiding new users

roadmap: Phase 2: Progressive key sovereignty with wallet migration tools
Phase 3: Fully decentralized onboarding with partner integrations
